global.title: Global
ideas: how much pushback or synthesis you prefer
artifact style that should apply across skills
global.boundary: Keep global guidance additive. Skill-specific Strike mechanics still win.

brainstorm.title: Brainstorm
brainstorm.target: how brainstorm explores, challenges, narrows, and saves ideas
ideas: preferred audience, problem, or constraint framing
extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
brainstorm.boundary: Do not turn brainstorm into grill, spec, slice, or implementation.

grill.title: Grill
grill.target: how grill asks decision questions and pressure-tests tradeoffs
ideas: how rejected paths should be recorded
technical, product, or workflow tradeoffs to emphasize
extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
grill.boundary: Do not turn grill into spec, slice, implementation, acceptance, or retro.

research.title: Research
research.target: how research gathers evidence and summarizes findings
ideas: how deep to go before spec
extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
research.boundary: Do not turn research into spec, slice, implementation, acceptance, or retro.

spec.title: Spec
spec.target: how spec writes durable project rules and acceptance detail
ideas: extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
spec.boundary: Do not turn spec into slicing, implementation planning, review, acceptance, or retro.

slice.title: Slice
slice.target: how slice turns a spec into buildable vertical phases
ideas: extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
slice.boundary: Do not turn slice into phase-plan, implementation, review, acceptance, or retro.

phase-research.title: Phase Research
phase-research.target: how phase-research checks tactical evidence before build planning
ideas: extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
phase-research.boundary: Do not turn phase-research into phase-plan, implementation, review, acceptance, or retro.

phase-plan.title: Phase Plan
phase-plan.target: how phase-plan writes build briefs and verification plans
ideas: extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
phase-plan.boundary: Do not turn phase-plan into implementation, review, acceptance, or retro.

phase-build.title: Phase Build
phase-build.target: how phase-build implements a planned phase and records build evidence
ideas: how strongly to prefer existing repo patterns
extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
phase-build.boundary: Do not expand beyond the selected phase, skip verification, change board mechanics, create review, acceptance, or retro artifacts, or commit.

phase-fix.title: Phase Fix
phase-fix.target: how phase-fix repairs blocking review or acceptance findings
ideas: extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
phase-fix.boundary: Do not fix outside blocking review or acceptance findings, rerun review or acceptance, move the board out of implementation, or commit.

accept.title: Accept
accept.target: how acceptance judges readiness against the Strike spec
ideas: extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
accept.boundary: Do not lower acceptance gates, edit implementation files, create retro files, or move to retro with unresolved fixes or human checks.

retro.title: Retro
retro.target: what retro captures after accepted work
ideas: how concise the retro should be
extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
retro.boundary: Do not reopen implementation, review, or acceptance work from retro customization.

demo.title: Demo
demo.target: how demo creates small planning demos for decision support
ideas: extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
demo.boundary: Do not turn demo into production implementation or make demos required for any stage.

language.title: Language
language.target: how language reviews terminology and domain wording
ideas: how uncertain terms should be discussed
when to ask before changing UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md
language.boundary: Do not apply uncertain glossary changes without user approval.
